strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops on testing)
concerns: Resume does not explicitly mention Nest.js or Vitest from the primary stack
Limited explicit cloud platform breadth (AWS noted, but GCP/Azure and Kubernetes depth unclear)
Currently on a career gap since October 2025
response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of full-stack engineering experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React work, plus recent hands-on involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators that directly aligns with the role's internal automation tooling focus. Engineering rigor (TDD, CI/CD, testing workshops) and polyglot breadth fit the JD well, though Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly evidenced and cloud/K8s depth is only partially visible from the resume.
